home.tagline: Level up by starring open source on GitHub
home.description: Link GitHub, star public repos, earn XP, and climb to level 100. Each repo counts once; daily recognition caps scale with your level.

login.title: Log in to Star Level
login.subtitle: Sign in with email, then bind GitHub on the dashboard to earn Star XP.

signup.title: Sign up for Star Level
signup.subtitle: After signup, bind GitHub and earn XP by starring public repositories.
signup.githubButton: Sign up / log in with GitHub

bindGitHub.title: Bind GitHub
bindGitHub.subtitle: Link GitHub after signup to sync starred public repos and earn XP.
bindGitHub.linkedMessage: GitHub is linked. Sync stars to recognize new repos.
bindGitHub.manualLinkingStep1: Open Supabase → Authentication → Sign In / Providers
bindGitHub.manualLinkingStep3: Save, return here, and click Connect GitHub again
bindGitHub.orGitHubLogin: Or sign out and log in with GitHub (same email may auto-link)
bindGitHub.githubLoginButton: Sign out & log in with GitHub

dashboard.syncDescription: Each newly recognized public repo grants 10 XP. Same repo counts once per account.
dashboard.ruleReset: Business day resets at 01:00 Beijing time

progress.footer: Business day {date} (resets 01:00 Beijing) · +10 XP per new repo

sync.githubRequired: GitHub authorization required. Go to Bind GitHub and reconnect.

metadata.title: Star Level
metadata.description: Level up by starring open source repositories on GitHub
